title: veronica scardica subsp. scardica
intro: Veronica scardica subsp. scardica, also known as mountain tea, is a plant species that belongs to the Veronica genus and is native to the Balkan Peninsula. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Veronica scardica subsp. scardica include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as exhibiting potential effects on the cardiovascular system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in folk medicine to promote overall well-being.
